title: Silly Games — game.json
description: Metadata for one game, placed at games/<id>/game.json. Add the id to hub/registry.json to publish it.

title.description: Display name shown on the card and hero.

description.description: A sentence or two shown on the featured hero.

thumb.description: Card image path, RELATIVE to the game folder, e.g. docs/thumb.png.

hero.description: Large featured image path, RELATIVE to the game folder.

featured.description: If true, this game is shown in the hero banner (only one should be featured).

status.description: "ready" shows a playable card; "soon" shows a locked card.
